'''âs-d-p''' ('''kasadap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaporize|vaporize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaporize|vaporize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-d-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasadap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadap|thisadap]] || [[word:jisadap|jisadap]] || [[word:shisadap|shisadap]] || [[word:kisadap|kisadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusadap|thuthusadap]] || [[word:jujusadap|jujusadap]] || [[word:shushusadap|shushusadap]] || [[word:kukusadap|kukusadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusadap|thusadap]] || [[word:jusadap|jusadap]] || [[word:shusadap|shusadap]] || [[word:kusadap|kusadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusadap|thusadap]] || [[word:jusadap|jusadap]] || [[word:shusadap|shusadap]] || [[word:kusadap|kusadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesadap|thesadap]] || [[word:jesadap|jesadap]] || [[word:shesadap|shesadap]] || [[word:kesadap|kesadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosadap|thothosadap]] || [[word:jojosadap|jojosadap]] || [[word:shoshosadap|shoshosadap]] || [[word:kokosadap|kokosadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosadap|thosadap]] || [[word:josadap|josadap]] || [[word:shosadap|shosadap]] || [[word:kosadap|kosadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosadap|thosadap]] || [[word:josadap|josadap]] || [[word:shosadap|shosadap]] || [[word:kosadap|kosadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsadap|thĂŠsadap]] || [[word:jĂŠsadap|jĂŠsadap]] || [[word:shĂŠsadap|shĂŠsadap]] || [[word:kĂŠsadap|kĂŠsadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasadap|thathasadap]] || [[word:jajasadap|jajasadap]] || [[word:shashasadap|shashasadap]] || [[word:kakasadap|kakasadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasadap|thasadap]] || [[word:jasadap|jasadap]] || [[word:shasadap|shasadap]] || [[word:kasadap|kasadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasadap|thasadap]] || [[word:jasadap|jasadap]] || [[word:shasadap|shasadap]] || [[word:kasadap|kasadap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasadap|shasadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasadap|goshasadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasadap|gokishasadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasadapnĂŒ|shasadapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasadapnknĂŒ|goshasadapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadapnĂŒ|gokishasadapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasadapshĂ«|shasadapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasadapnkshĂ«|goshasadapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasadapshĂ«|gokishasadapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadapro|shasadapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadapnkro|goshasadapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadapro|gokishasadapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadapmu|shasadapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadapnkmu|goshasadapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadapmu|gokishasadapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasadapsher|shasadapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasadapnksher|goshasadapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasadapsher|gokishasadapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasadapng|shasadapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasadapnkng|goshasadapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasadapng|gokishasadapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasadapya|shasadapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasadapnkya|goshasadapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasadapya|gokishasadapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasadapyam|shasadapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasadapnkyam|goshasadapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasadapyam|gokishasadapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasadapnĂŒshĂ«|shasadapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasadapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasadapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasadapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasadapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadapnĂŒro|shasadapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadapnknĂŒro|goshasadapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadapnĂŒro|gokishasadapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadapnĂŒmu|shasadapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadapnknĂŒmu|goshasadapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadapnĂŒmu|gokishasadapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasadapshĂ«nĂŒ|shasadapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasadapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasadapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasadapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadapshĂ«ro|shasadapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadapnkshĂ«ro|goshasadapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadapshĂ«ro|gokishasadapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadapshĂ«mu|shasadapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadapnkshĂ«mu|goshasadapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadapshĂ«mu|gokishasadapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasadapronĂŒ|shasadapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasadapnkronĂŒ|goshasadapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadapronĂŒ|gokishasadapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasadaproshĂ«|shasadaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasadapnkroshĂ«|goshasadapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasadaproshĂ«|gokishasadaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadapromu|shasadapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadapnkromu|goshasadapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadapromu|gokishasadapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasadapmunĂŒ|shasadapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasadapnkmunĂŒ|goshasadapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadapmunĂŒ|gokishasadapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasadapmushĂ«|shasadapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasadapnkmushĂ«|goshasadapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasadapmushĂ«|gokishasadapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadapmuro|shasadapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadapnkmuro|goshasadapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadapmuro|gokishasadapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
